headline: China tightens private fund regulation, targeting systemic risks and promoting quality growth
headline_zh: 中国加强私募基金监管，防范系统性风险
narrative: The day's most consequential story is the State Council's new guidelines on private investment funds, unveiled by the CSRC. This signals a decisive push to close regulatory gaps after years of rapid expansion, hedge fund failures and retail investor losses. The document emphasizes risk prevention, investor protection and high-quality development, likely forcing industry consolidation. Meanwhile, MOFCOM's anti-dumping action on polyoxymethylene from three Asian countries underscores a continued activist trade policy. The market, however, shrugged off the tightening, with the SSE Composite rising 1.12%. Elsewhere, a Qiushi interview on campus culture suggests the Party is doubling down on ideological education, while a CGTN report that green power met all new electricity demand in 2025 provides a positive environmental narrative.
narrative_zh: 当日最重要的消息是国务院关于私募投资基金的新指导意见，由证监会发布。这标志着在多年快速扩张、对冲基金爆雷和散户投资者损失之后，监管层决心填补漏洞。文件强调风险防范、投资者保护和高质量发展，可能引发行业整合。与此同时，商务部对来自三个亚洲国家的共聚聚甲醛征收反倾销税，表明积极的贸易政策仍在继续。然而，市场未受监管收紧影响，上证综指上涨1.12%。此外，《求是》关于校园文化的采访显示党正在加强意识形态教育；CGTN关于2025年绿色电力满足全部新增电力需求的报道则提供了积极的环境叙事。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4031.513 ▲1.12% · Shenzhen Component 14963.407 ▲0.75% · ChiNext 3830.353 ▲0.50% · USD/CNY 6.7621 ▼0.19% · USD/CNH 6.76 ▼0.04%
